name: anyonemap-worker
description: AnyoneMap Cloudflare Worker build + security tooling. `npm run build` is the only blessed build path: it fails closed on any HIGH XSS-sink finding and writes no artifact until the front end is clean.

scripts.build: node build-worker.js worker-shell.js kv-schema.js index.html anyonemap-worker.js
scripts.build:force: node build-worker.js worker-shell.js kv-schema.js index.html anyonemap-worker.js --no-lint
